title: Setup MERN Project Structure
description: Initialize Vite React app on the frontend and Express.js on the backend. Connect backend to MongoDB.

title: Configure JWT Authentication Flow
description: Add registration and login routes with password hashing. Store token in localStorage and protect routes.

title: Design Dashboard Interface
description: Implement task counter, completed percentage, search bar, filters and paginated task grid list using clean CSS.

title: Write Lab/Assignment Report
description: Prepare a 4-page report documenting the system design, screenshots, and setup steps for the internship evaluation.

title: Prepare Demo Video for Evaluators
description: Record a 3-minute video showing user registration, login, creating a task, updating status, searching, and deleting a task.

title: Push Code to GitHub Repository
description: Create a README file, push frontend and backend folders to git, and submit the link on the college portal.
